description: This file defines a React component for the main application shell layout, including navigation, sidebar with tags, and header elements for a note-taking app. It includes hooks for authentication, routing, and data fetching for tags.

methods.name: NavLink
methods.description: A React component that renders a navigation link with active styling based on the current URL.

methods.name: AppShell
methods.description: Main React component that provides the application's layout, including header, navigation, tag sidebar, and content area.
